name: Quantum Kernel Classifier
author: openqc-team
description: Classify data using quantum kernel estimation. Encodes data into quantum states and computes kernel matrix entries via fidelity tests.

metadata.academic_intro: Can quantum computers enhance machine learning? Quantum kernel methods map data into a high-dimensional Hilbert space where classical separability emerges — a quantum advantage for pattern recognition.
metadata.expected_takeaway: You will see how quantum feature maps create kernels that capture patterns classical kernels might miss, demonstrated on a simple classification task.
